title: New Note — orphan HEIC attachment (end of July 2024)
html:
TL;DR

  • Orphan Apple Note dated July 31, 2024 containing a single HEIC image reference (05E76152-B59A-475E-8470-906A5B978E3C) — zero text content.
  • Created and modified within ~2 seconds of each other → captured-and-abandoned in one tap, never returned to.
  • Sits inside the china chapter window, between the wrld side quests manifesto and the August travel-occurrences notes — silent night/day in Yahir's text record but a photo was taken.
  • Sibling to 2024 06 16 new note and 2024 09 10 3 — three orphan-attachment notes in summer/fall 2024 that exemplify the capture-and-forget failure mode.
  • Asset HEIC is not exported by the SQLite-based Apple Notes pipeline; only the pointer string survives in the raw export.

Notes

  • The 2-second create-modify gap is the tell: Yahir hit the share-sheet → "Save to Notes" → never typed a caption. Phone-flow inertia.
  • Recovery path if image ever matters: pull from iCloud Photos by the surrounding timestamp window (last week of July 2024). Outside scope for an ingest pass.
  • This is one of the cleanest negative-space data points in the corpus: it tells you Yahir was alive and capturing things on July 31 2024 — and nothing else.

Connections

  • — orphan-attachment subtype
  • 2024 06 16 new note · 2024 09 10 3 — sibling orphans
  • china chapter — temporal frame
  • shanghai study abroad — life context
